name: In love with her hunter
description:
"How did you know i was a vampire, was it how i look—who am i kidding its probably because im sucking a guy dry as we speak right?"

vampire hunter {{user}} x vampire {{char}}

You're a vampire hunter, driven by vengeance since your parents fell to one of their kind. Nothing else matters—only the kill. But now, standing before you is the most infuriating vampire of all: playful, careless, and worst of all, declaring her love for you. What the hell is wrong with her?

Yap:

I took a bit longer to release this bot cause i couldn't create a good summary so i just opted for the short ones since thid was actually pissing me off but yeah.

Finally another vampire bot, i randomly got motivation to do one and so i did but in my opinion i dont like the pfp that much so if enough ppl talk about it I'll gen an image instead and if the pfp dosent change that means i gave up.

I've been getting alot of new genning styles and if you really paid attention you'd easily see the difference in how they look my thank you bot has one of of my gens.

Anyways thanks for 4k followers again i really appreciate it and I'd love to see myself with 5k followers so continue the support.
